markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Catch up on business progress and discuss future collaboration between fwd.digital and Litebox Strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both companies experiencing rapid growth; fwd.digital paused new clients at 20, Litebox added 100+ high-tech projects in 11 months](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Marcel provided feedback on Litebox's work, highlighting need for streamlined processes and tailored solutions for startups](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Mutual interest in continued collaboration, with focus on flexible, efficient engagements and cross-referrals](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)

## Topics

### Company Updates

  - [fwd.digital:](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
    
      - [Grew to 20 clients rapidly, now pausing new client acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
      - [First client quit job to join as VP of Growth](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
      - [Making new hires, building automation and infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
      - [Marcel left Deepgram end of September, now 100% focused on fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
      - [Balancing company growth with family life (new baby)](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)

  - [Litebox Strategies:](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
    
      - [Added 100+ projects from high-tech companies in past 11 months](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
      - [New clients include Deepgram, Coder, Resolve AI, Transmit Security](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
      - [Working with Kevin (former CFO of Warpcast) at Hyper Mode](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
      - [Focusing on more retainer-based work, promoting "engineering to marketing team" model](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Project Feedback and Improvements

  - [Marcel's feedback on Litebox's work:](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
    
      - [Final product quality is good](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [Too many people involved for a simple landing page project](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
      - [Some processes overcomplicated (e.g., AWS setup for single-page site)](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
      - [Need for better understanding of startup client needs and stages](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
      - [Desire for more direct access to talented individuals (e.g., designers) rather than large team meetings](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)

  - [Litebox's response:](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
    
      - [Acknowledged potential overkill in some engineering decisions](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
      - [Explained reasons for team structure (quality control, career development)](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
      - [Proposed middle-ground solutions (e.g., designer with minimal management support)](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)

### Future Collaboration

  - [Marcel expressed need for flexible, fast-moving support across multiple fronts](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Litebox highlighted adaptability to startup needs and changing priorities](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Both parties interested in continued collaboration and cross-referrals](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Marcel offered to be a reference for Litebox's work](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Discussed potential for more structured engagement in the future](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Litebox to prepare flexible engagement options for fwd.digital, considering their startup stage and need for agility](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [Marcel to follow up in a couple of weeks to discuss potential ongoing collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [Both parties to continue exploring cross-referral opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Schedule in-person meeting when Litebox team is next in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/y8T-czptXNJHfQ17iyZvZUeMGFx457g6?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
